task_completion.description: Generate NACA 0012 airfoil and run XFoil polar analysis
task_completion.visual_evidence: QBlade interface showing the NACA 0012 airfoil loaded (100 panels) and an XFoil polar analysis generated with Re=1,000,000, NCrit=9, and AoA ranging from -5 to 20.

task_completion.description: Create 'StructBlade10' with correct sections, chord, and twist
task_completion.visual_evidence: Blade Design module in QBlade showing a blade named 'StructBlade10' with exactly three sections at positions 0m, 5m, and 10m. The table should show a Chord of 1.0m and Twist of 0 for all three sections, using the NACA 0012 airfoil.

task_completion.description: Assign distributed structural properties (Mass and Stiffness EI) to the blade
task_completion.visual_evidence: Blade Structural Design table/module in QBlade showing the structural properties assigned to the sections: Mass values of 40, 20, and 5 kg/m, and Stiffness (EI) values of 1.0e7, 0.5e7, and 0.1e7 (or 10000000, 5000000, 1000000) at the 0m, 5m, and 10m positions respectively.

task_completion.description: Record the resulting Total Blade Mass in blade_mass.txt
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal output showing the file `/home/ga/Documents/blade_mass.txt` containing a numeric value close to 212.5 (acceptable range 210.0 to 215.0).

task_completion.description: Save the QBlade project to the specified path
task_completion.visual_evidence: QBlade save dialog, terminal, or file manager showing the project file saved exactly as `/home/ga/Documents/projects/structural_design.wpa`.

integrity.description: Agent used the QBlade GUI to design the blade and structural properties
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent actively clicking through QBlade's Blade Design and Structural Design modules, rather than just writing a script to generate a .wpa file.

integrity.description: Agent obtained the mass from QBlade rather than calculating it externally or copying from instructions
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should view the calculated total mass within the QBlade interface before writing it to the text file.

integrity.description: Agent did not simply echo the target mass without building the blade
integrity.visual_evidence: The text file creation must happen after the blade structural properties are fully defined in QBlade.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target total blade mass is 212.5 kg (acceptable tolerance is ±2.5 kg, so any value between 210.0 and 215.0 is correct). The blade must be named 'StructBlade10'. Structural mass values are [40, 20, 5] kg/m and Stiffness (EI) values are [10000000, 5000000, 1000000] at positions 0m, 5m, and 10m. Expected project path: '/home/ga/Documents/projects/structural_design.wpa'. Expected report path: '/home/ga/Documents/blade_mass.txt'.
